\- December 2, 2015 -
Join Us in Manassas on Wednesday!

| Dear Peter Willis, Join us on Wednesday, December 2nd in Manassas, VA for a Donald J. Trump for President Rally. The event begins at 7:30 p.m., doors open at 5:00 p.m. Please arrive well ahead of start time and limit personal items for expedited entry. Tickets are available at [TrumpManassas.Eventbrite.com](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zujmdd-drdiuiutjh-j/). The event will be held at the Prince William County Fairground - 10624 Dumfries Road Manassas, VA 20112. Team Trump looks forward to another successful event in Virginia! We hope to see you there!
---

name: Rand Paul
subject: Wake-up call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,
These past few weeks have been a huge wake-up
call for Americans.
Not just because of the attacks in Paris,
which made it clear we should have better policies on refugees,
but also because it revealed a lot about my fellow Republican
presidential candidates and their tendency to favor big
government over individual liberty.
I'm the only one willing to stand up against
the status quo -- against a growing government. That's why
they're trying to silence me.
But I won't let them drown us out and I know
I can count on you, Fellow Conservative, to stand with me and make a big
impression with my latest money bomb.
We need to raise $200,000 over this weekend
to cover filing fees, grassroots efforts, and digital advertising
leading up to the next GOP debate.

Give $10 Today >>

Give $25 Today >>

Give $50 Today >>

Give $100 Today >>

Or donate another
amount >>

We know the media has been working to block
our message this whole time. And now we know CNN was working
directly with Hillary Clinton to smear me!
That was an actual headline that broke right
before Thanksgiving: "EMAILS: CNN REPORTER COORDINATED WITH
HILLARY AIDE TO SMEAR RAND PAUL . . ."

Official State Department emails revealed
that a CNN reporter coordinated with Clinton staffer to launch
social media attacks against me for daring to ask Secretary
Clinton tough questions during the 2013 Benghazi hearing!

With the December 15 Republican Debate in Las
Vegas rapidly approaching, I have to ask...

Is this a reporter concerned with uncovering
critical news to bring to the American people? Or is this a
partisan who's already in the tank for her Democrat candidate of
choice?

Fellow Conservative, we can't allow the media's
shenanigans to silence us. We have to break through and take our
message of liberty straight to the American people.

If you agree, will you please make your most
generous contribution of $50, $25 or even $10 to my campaign's
Money Bomb at once?
Let's show them all, conservative policies
speak louder than back-room deals, insider emails, and big
government by making a contribution for liberty on Black Friday
or cyber Monday.
Will you stand with me today and send a big
message to all the naysayers?
In liberty,
Rand Paul

Give $10 Today >>

Give $25 Today >>

Give $50 Today >>

Give $100 Today >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Team Murphy
subject: Shady right-wing spies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friends,

We all figured the Koch brothers were desperate to elect Republicans who will carry out their right-wing agenda. But after the Kochs' latest IRS filings, we _know_ just how deep into the shadows they are willing to sink to get what they want.

_Politico_ reported that the Kochs built a 25-person team -- complete with an ex-CIA operative -- dedicated to spying on Democratic-aligned organizations.

This means we can't waste any time preparing for Patrick's Senate race. **Florida will determine which party takes control of the Senate in 2016, so it 's at the top of the Kochs' watch list. And right now the race is a TOSSUP.**

[**Patrick is relying on his grassroots network to defeat the Kochs ' shady, secretive one. We need to hit our goal of $50,000. Contribute $5 or more right now to get us on track.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21c8/738133e4/3a24a355/7f8346a8/107021091/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151128?refcode=pme151128_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

We know we don't have to tell you how much is at stake here. Florida's Senate race is already poised to be one of the most expensive races in the 2016 election cycle. And the Kochs have cash to burn.

The Kochs' most aggressive political network, Americans for Prosperity (AFP), spent $77 million in the 2014 election cycle. Get this, AFP has already attacked Patrick.

But spies and attack ads aren't what's going to win this election. Grassroots support is what ultimately leads to victory. Right now, we need to make sure Patrick has yours.

[**Help us reach our November fundraising goal so we can be ready for whatever the Kochs throw at us. Now is our chance to pull ahead and secure the Senate for Democrats.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21c8/738133e4/3a24a355/7f8346a8/107021091/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151128?refcode=pme151128_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Thank you,

Team Murphy | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21c8/738133e4/3a24a355/7f8346a9/107021091/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

name: Jeb Bush
subject: I'll be honest
body:
Friend -- our November fundraising deadline is our most critical one yet, and I'm counting on you.

**We have to raise $76,248 to hit our goal of $200,000 in three days. It 's a lot, but with 65 days until the Iowa Caucuses, missing fundraising goals is not an option.**

[**So please chip in $50, $25, or even $5 right now so we can beat our November fundraising goal of $200,000 and hit the ground running heading into 2016.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/cjcrvgmzqlcfhshtfgnrqfksmmfkzsvzrgjgczsphgtq_bqcggbzd.html)

These are serious times, and the voters are hungry for real leadership. They're tired of President Obama's failed policies -- they want a commander-in-chief who is ready to lead and will shake up Washington.

I know you know that - we all know that. But the only way to send that message to Hillary Clinton and the rest of the pack is to hit $200,000 in the next 72 hours.

**Friend , I need you today. Join our fight by contributing $50, $25 or even $5 to help us reach our $200,000 November fundraising goal before Monday at midnight:**
[**Jeb2016.com/Donate/**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/rtkfyklbwvgpjsjcpkqfwphsllphbsybfktkgbsnjkcl_bqcggbzd.html)
Thank you,

Jeb

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/hcqrjsfpmwczndnvzsgrmzldffzlpdjprshscpdbnsqn_bqcggbzd.html)
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144

name: deadline@katiemcginty.com
subject: The firepower necessary
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
Friend --

It's just after Thanksgiving, and we can't blame you for tucking into those leftovers and relaxing on the couch with your friends and family.

And while we want to keep the holiday festivities going here at campaign headquarters, we've still got work to do, so we can't afford to rest.

Friend, we need to win Pennsylvania if we want to take back the Senate. And that means we can't fall short of our fundraising goals.

**That 's why we've set our biggest fundraising goal yet -- 5,000 founding donors by November 30. We need your help TODAY to send the unmistakable message that Pennsylvania is ready for new leadership.**

[**Before Monday 's deadline: Chip in $5 or whatever you can and send Katie to Washington to fight for us.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/1090657363716734976/-2042361540291592192?refcode=e20151128&refcode2=e20151128nd&amount=5)

We need your help if we're going to give Katie the firepower necessary to mount a winning campaign.

[**Help Katie meet her biggest fundraising goal yet -- contribute now.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/1090657363716734976/-2042361540291592192?refcode=e20151128&refcode2=e20151128nd&amount=5)

Thank you,

Team Katie

name: Ben Carson
subject: My visit with Syrian refugees
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31926326:sQtuKlyN0:m:1:876315805:CA590ECF79CCFDD56F2B8832D2FB9057:r)
---

Peter,
Just over two months ago I began planning a trip over the Thanksgiving weekend to visit with Syrian refugees, Jordanian government officials, and NGO's. I wanted to see with my own eyes this great human tragedy.

Today I listened to the life struggles of many Syrians who were forced to flee their own homes. I met with medical professionals, humanitarian workers and government officials. I saw pain on the faces of mothers and children.

They came to Jordan for safety. Jordan is doing an amazing job opening its doors and extending a hand in relief. The rest of the world could be doing so much more.
---
These brave people want nothing more than an end to the war in Syria. They want to go back to their lives. We must find a political end to this conflict.

Millions of refugees have now been waiting years for the end of the war to come in Jordan, Lebanon and Turkey. Some are giving up hope that they will ever be able to return to the country. We must keep their hope alive.

Until it is safe for them to return home, Jordan is a safe place for them to wait. The Kingdom has welcomed them with open arms. But Jordan is a small country. They need the world's help to feed, educate, and care for these refugees until the war ends.

The United States must do more. We can do our part to help this crisis without bringing 10,000 to 25,000 refugees to the United States. Jordan already houses 1.4 million refugees. Jordan needs and deserves our logistical help and financial support.

In the coming days I will offer what I believe are real solutions to the problems created in part by the Obama-Clinton Administration's failed policies.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

| | |

clean_body: | | Peter, Just over two months ago I began planning a trip over the Thanksgiving weekend to visit with Syrian refugees, Jordanian government officials, and NGO's. I wanted to see with my own eyes this great human tragedy. Today I listened to the life struggles of many Syrians who were forced to flee their own homes. I met with medical professionals, humanitarian workers and government officials. I saw pain on the faces of mothers and children. They came to Jordan for safety. Jordan is doing an amazing job opening its doors and extending a hand in relief. The rest of the world could be doing so much more. These brave people want nothing more than an end to the war in Syria. They want to go back to their lives. We must find a political end to this conflict. Millions of refugees have now been waiting years for the end of the war to come in Jordan, Lebanon and Turkey. Some are giving up hope that they will ever be able to return to the country. We must keep their hope alive. Until it is safe for them to return home, Jordan is a safe place for them to wait. The Kingdom has welcomed them with open arms. But Jordan is a small country. They need the world's help to feed, educate, and care for these refugees until the war ends. The United States must do more. We can do our part to help this crisis without bringing 10,000 to 25,000 refugees to the United States. Jordan already houses 1.4 million refugees. Jordan needs and deserves our logistical help and financial support. In the coming days I will offer what I believe are real solutions to the problems created in part by the Obama-Clinton Administration's failed policies. Sincerely, Ben Carson | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Make a donation | | Show your support for Ben on social media Carson America, Inc | P.O. Box 26261 | Alexandria, VA 22313 | Paid for by Carson America, Inc. This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system April 11, 2015. name: Rand Paul
subject: They were wrong then and they're wrong now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,
With less than 24 hours in my campaign's end
of the month finance deadline, I'm counting on your support.

With state filing fees due, the last
Republican debate of 2015 and my grassroots outreach efforts
hitting full stride, December is going to be a huge month for my
campaign.

As the only candidate who is offering real
change from the failed foreign policy Hillary Clinton and my
Republican opponents are offering the American people, I believe
the momentum you and I have created over the past month will keep
growing.

But it's absolutely critical we hit our
$200,000 fundraising goal.

So will you please agree to your most
generous contribution of $50, $25 or $10 at once?

Fellow Conservative, the recent ISIS-led terrorist
attacks in Paris have restarted the debate on how to defend this
nation.

There are politicians in this country who
would have us throw our borders wide open to anyone who wants to
come in, keep doling out foreign aid to countries that burn our
flag, drive up our national debt with a trillion dollars in new
military spending, spy on our private phone calls and emails and
embroil American soldiers in other countries' civil wars.

This will not make us safer. In fact, it's
proven not to work.

Not long ago, my wife Kelley and I helped
build a home for a wounded veteran who lost both legs and an arm
in battle. I remember him telling me that he joined the military
to defend the Bill of Rights and the U.S. Constitution.

Like many patriotic Americans, he believed
the principles embedded within these precious documents were
worth fighting and dying for.

To this day, I wear a red bracelet that was
given to me by the widow of an Iraq War vet that includes her
husband's dog tag information.

I believe sending troops into battle is the
most solemn responsibility any President has.

As the Constitution mandates, it must never
be done without a formal declaration from Congress like this
President has done over and over again in.

Today, I believe the American people are fed
up with President Obama and the people in both parties so
willing to send our sons and daughters to war.

The overwhelming majority understand that the
Iraq War didn't make us any safer.

And they've seen how toppling secular
dictators in Iraq, Egypt and Libya have actually emboldened
radical Islamists like ISIS.

I believe in Ronald Reagan's axiom "Peace
Through Strength."

Projecting strength abroad starts with
getting our own house in order.

It means securing our porous borders and
ending taxpayer handouts for Syrian refugees, so we can ensure
we're not allowing those into our country who aim to do us harm.

It means tackling our growing $18.7 TRILLION
debt. A good place to start would be ending foreign aid to
countries who burn our flag or refuse to recognize Israel.

It means protecting the Bill of Rights that
so many Americans sign up for military service to protect.

And instead of rushing into a new war in the
Middle East like Hillary Clinton and members of my own party seem
so intent on, I've said no more American boots on the ground in
the Middle East.

The boots on the ground fighting ISIS must
belong to Arabs. Let's see them standing up and fighting to
protect their own countries

That's why I continue to support arming the
Kurds to take on ISIS.

The Iraq War and American-led occupation and
nation-building only destabilized the Middle East and made it
even more chaotic.

They were wrong then.

And those in BOTH parties who are arguing for
grand new war in the Middle East are wrong now.

It's time for a new direction.

If you agree, please make your most generous
contribution of $50, $25 or even $10 right away!
In Liberty,
Rand Paul

Give $10 Today >>

Give $25 Today >>

Give $50 Today >>

Give $100 Today >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.

[Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjQxMDg5MTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyODAwMDQzS0&mt=1&rt=0)! name: Sam Smith
subject: BREAKING: The New Hampshire Union Leader Endorses Chris Christie for President
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
|
---
| |
---|---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45132218:JanRonLPN:m:1:1516426255:9EB527AB1F59909B904FB933C0D174CE:r) |
| | | _" Chris Christie is a solid, pro-life conservative who has managed to govern in liberal New Jersey, face down the big public unions, and win a second term. Gov. Christie can work across the aisle, but he won't get rolled by the bureaucrats. We don't need as President some well-meaning person from the private sector who has no public experience_ _"_ **For our safety, our future: Chris Christie for President**
Joseph McQuaid
[_New Hampshire Union Leader_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45132218:JanRonLPN:m:1:1516426255:9EB527AB1F59909B904FB933C0D174CE:r) ... Our choice is Gov. Chris Christie. As a U.S. attorney and then a big-state governor, he is the one candidate who has the range and type of experience the nation desperately needs. We don't need another fast-talking, well-meaning freshman U.S. senator trying to run the government. We are still seeing the disastrous effects of the last such choice. Chris Christie is a solid, pro-life conservative who has managed to govern in liberal New Jersey, face down the big public unions, and win a second term. Gov. Christie can work across the aisle, but he won't get rolled by the bureaucrats. We don't need as President some well-meaning person from the private sector who has no public experience. Gov. Christie is right for these dangerous times. He has prosecuted terrorists and dealt admirably with major disasters. But the one reason he may be best-suited to lead during these times is because he tells it like it is and isn't shy about it. Other candidates have gained public and media attention by speaking bluntly. But it's important when you are telling it like it is to actually know what you are talking about. Gov. Christie knows what he is saying because he has experienced it. And unlike some others, he believes in what he says because he has a strong set of conservative values. Gov. Chris Christie is exactly the conservative Republican needed to take the fight to Hillary Clinton next fall and then get about the serious business of defending us and rebuilding our economy. [Read the full article here](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45132218:JanRonLPN:m:1:1516426255:9EB527AB1F59909B904FB933C0D174CE:r).
---

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45132219:JanRonLPN:m:1:1516426255:9EB527AB1F59909B904FB933C0D174CE:r)
---

---
